channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former England Captain Kevin Keegan Passes Away at 75, Leaving Lasting Legacy
item.description: Kevin Keegan, a former England captain and manager, passed away at 75 after a battle with cancer. His family and Newcastle United confirmed his death, marking the end of a glittering career that spann...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with access restrictions
item.description: The article discusses News Corp Australia's measures to manage crawler bot traffic on their websites. Users encountering a block message as a reader or subscriber are advised to disable AdBlockers, ad...

item.title: NAFDAC Seizes Tankers Containing Diesel Intended for Edible Oil in Lagos
item.description: The National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control (NAFDAC) intercepted two tankers designated to transport edible vegetable oil after they were found carrying Automotive Gas Oil (diesel...

item.title: India Suspends Indus Waters Treaty Over Pakistan's Terror Support and Water Disputes
item.description: The Indus Waters Treaty, a 1960 agreement between India and Pakistan for sharing river waters, is being suspended due to Pakistan's continued support for cross-border terrorism. India has halted the t...

item.title: Tragic loss of a family dog and updates on Maya Gebala's recovery from the shooting incident
item.description: The article details the emotional journey of Cia Edmonds, the mother of Maya Gebala, as she navigates the grief of losing her cherished French bulldog while also managing her daughter's recovery from ...

item.title: Dollar Tree Closes 75 Stores Amid Expansion Plans
item.description: Dollar Tree, a popular discount retailer, announced plans to close approximately 75 underperforming stores nationwide during fiscal 2026 while simultaneously expanding its physical presence by opening...

item.title: Government Seizes R326 Million in Assets Linked to Maumela Corruption Case
item.description: Justice and Constitutional Development Minister Mmamoloko Kubayi has commended the Johannesburg High Court's decision to forfeit assets valued at approximately R326 million linked to the Maumela case....

item.title: Four Women Lead Key Legal Institutions in Nigeria
item.description: Nigeria's legal sector has achieved a major milestone with four women assuming top roles across key institutions. Justice Kudirat Kekere-Ekun leads as Chief Justice of Nigeria, while Justice Monica Do...

item.title: Sigabo: Episode 21 - Rudy's Life Saved in Emotional Rescue
item.description: The article discusses the emotionally charged episode 21 of the TV series 'Sigabo,' where the character Rudy's life is saved in a dramatic rescue sequence. The episode, titled 'Gabo,' features key act...

item.title: China's Urban Renewal Projects Enhance Livability
item.description: Urban renewal initiatives across China are transforming aging communities into vibrant, livable spaces. Projects like the Beiyuanercun residential community in Nanjing and the Suzhou River area in Sha...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' Faces Criticism Over Character Portrayal and Casting Choices
item.description: Christopher Nolan's film 'The Odyssey' has encountered renewed criticism from right-wing commentators following its theatrical release. The controversy centers on a plot point where Odysseus expresses...

item.title: Wildfire Smoke Affects Air Quality and Health in Alberta
item.description: A severe air quality warning has been issued for Edmonton and much of Alberta due to wildfire smoke drifting down from the Northwest Territories. Environment Canada reports that 202 active fires are b...

item.title: Houthi rebels threaten Saudi Arabia's Red Sea ports with new maritime blockade
item.description: The Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen have announced a maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia, aiming to disrupt the kingdom's oil exports by targeting its Red Sea ports. This move comes amid escalati...

item.title: Moonshot AI Pauses New Subscriptions for Popular Kimi K3 Model Due to High Demand
item.description: Moonshot AI, a Beijing-based company, has temporarily paused new subscriptions for its Kimi K3 AI model after experiencing overwhelming demand that exceeded its current capacity. The open-source model...

item.title: Spain Celebrates World Cup Victory With Grand Parade In Madrid
item.description: Spain's World Cup-winning squad and coach Luis de la Fuente celebrated their historic victory with a vibrant parade through Madrid, drawing an estimated two million fans. The open-top bus procession, ...

item.title: Netflix series 'Operation Safed Sagar' highlights Indian Air Force's Kargil War heroism
item.description: The Netflix series 'Operation Safed Sagar' pays tribute to the bravery of an Indian Air Force squadron during the Kargil War, a conflict that took place in 1999 between India and Pakistan. The show, s...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard Denies Starting Confrontation with China Coast Guard
item.description: Rear Admiral Jay Tarriela, spokesperson of the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) for the West Philippine Sea, refuted allegations by the Chinese Embassy that Filipino servicemen from the BRP Sierra Madre i...

item.title: Houthis Declare Red Sea Oil Route Blockade, Sparking US-Iran Tensions
item.description: The Iran-backed Houthis have declared a naval blockade on Saudi Arabia, escalating tensions in the Middle East and threatening global energy supplies. Despite diplomatic efforts to resume talks, the H...

item.title: Spain's World Cup Photo Excludes Trump, Sparking Global Reaction
item.description: Following Spain's 1-0 victory over Argentina in the FIFA World Cup final on July 19, 2026, President Donald Trump attempted to photobomb the trophy presentation ceremony. However, the Spanish Football...

item.title: Nathan Buckley addresses Tassie Devils' decision to appoint Ken Hinkley as inaugural coach
item.description: Former AFL captain Nathan Buckley has expressed his views on the Tasmania Devils' choice to name Ken Hinkley as their first head coach instead of himself. The decision has sparked discussions about le...
